title: fragariastrum elatior
intro: Fragariastrum elatior, also known as the tall strawberry, is a perennial plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to help soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Fragariastrum elatior include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant often include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to make poultices or salves for topical application.
